title: campylospermum obtusifolium
intro: Campylospermum obtusifolium is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the chafftree or stinkwood tree. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Campylospermum obtusifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, among other uses. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
